title: Sai baba ji ki  Aarti
intro: Read Shri Sai Baba Ki Aarti and seek the divine blessings of Shri Sai Baba.
description:
Aarti Shri Sai Guruvar ki,
Parmanand sada survar ki॥
॥ Aarti Shri Sai Guruvar ki ॥

Jaaki kripa vipul sukhkari,
Duhkh, shok, sankat, bhay haari.
Shirdi mein avtaar rachaya,
Chamatkar se jag harshaya॥
॥ Aarti Shri Sai Guruvar ki ॥

Kitne bhakt sharan mein aaye,
Sab sukh-shanti chirantan paaye.
Bhav dhare jo man mein jaisa,
Paavat anubhav vahi vaisa॥
॥ Aarti Shri Sai Guruvar ki ॥

Guru ki udi lagaave tan ko,
Samadhan labhat us man ko.
Sai naam sada jo gaave,
So phal jag mein shashwat paave॥
॥ Aarti Shri Sai Guruvar ki ॥

Guruvasar kari puja seva,
Us par kripa karat gurudeva.
Ram, Krishna, Hanuman roop mein,
Janat jo shraddha dhar man mein॥
॥ Aarti Shri Sai Guruvar ki ॥

Vividh dharm ke sevak aate,
Darshan kar ichhit phal paate.
Sai Baba ki jai bolo,
Antarman mein anand gholo॥
॥ Aarti Shri Sai Guruvar ki ॥

Sai Das aarti gaave,
Base ghar mein sukh-mangal paave॥
॥ Aarti Shri Sai Guruvar ki ॥

Aarti Shri Sai Guruvar ki,
Parmanand sada survar ki॥

faq.q1: What is the main significance of performing Sai Baba's Aarti?
faq.a1: It is performed to seek inner peace, patience, faith, and the divine blessings of Baba.
faq.q2: Which is the most auspicious day for Sai Baba's Puja and Aarti?
faq.a2: Thursday is dedicated to Sai Baba and is considered the most auspicious day for his Aarti.
faq.q3: What offerings (Prasad) are preferred for Sai Baba during Aarti?
faq.a3: Sai Baba prefers simple vegetarian food, fruits, flowers, and Mishri (sugar candy).
faq.q4: Can Sai Baba's Aarti be performed at home?
faq.a4: Yes, you can perform the Aarti with full devotion in front of his photo or idol at home.
faq.q5: What should be done after the Aarti for peace of mind?
faq.a5: Chanting 'Om Sai Ram' and sitting in meditation after the Aarti is very soothing to the mind.
